title: Settings
settingsModeDesc: Basic mode shows daily workflow settings. Advanced mode includes account, key, and automation controls.
uiFontSizeDesc: Adjust the base size used for the OpenYak UI
codeFontSizeDesc: Adjust the base size used for code across chats and diffs
usePointerCursorsDesc: Change the cursor to a pointer when hovering over interactive elements
defaultModelDesc: Choose the default model for new conversations. Models are provided via OpenRouter.
modelAccessDesc: Choose how to connect to AI models.
providerModeDesc: Connect multiple providers and select which one to use. Switch anytime without disconnecting.
localProviderDesc: Point OpenYak to a locally hosted OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g., http://localhost:11434/v1).
localProviderConnectError: Cannot reach the configured endpoint. Make sure it exposes /v1/chat/completions.
openyakAccountDesc: Free models included with 1M tokens/week. Resets every Friday at 12:00 UTC. Buy credits for premium models.
apiKeyDesc: Enter your OpenRouter API key for direct access. Get one at
byokDesc: Use your own API keys for direct access to AI providers. Configure one or more providers below.
openrouterDesc: Aggregator — access 200+ models with one key. Get one at
defaultAgentDesc: Choose the default agent mode for new conversations.
thinkingModeDesc: When enabled, the AI shows its reasoning process for better answers.
workspaceDirectoryDesc: Restrict the assistant to only read and modify files within this directory. Leave empty for unrestricted access.
autoApproveDesc: Allow the assistant to perform actions without asking for permission each time.
fileChangesDesc: Create and edit files without asking
agentDesc_build: Full-featured AI assistant with all tools
remoteDesc: Control OpenYak from your phone. Tasks execute on this computer and results stream back.
remotePermissionDesc: How to handle tool approvals from remote tasks
remoteInstructions: Enable remote access to control OpenYak from your phone:
remoteStep1: Toggle the switch above to enable
remoteStep2: Scan the QR code with your phone camera
remoteStep3: Or open the tunnel URL in your phone browser
aboutDesc: Your local AI assistant — private, powerful, personal.
permissionsDesc: Choices saved from permission prompts. They apply to future requests from this browser.
permissionsEmptyDesc: When you choose Remember this choice, it will appear here.
memoryDesc: Each workspace maintains its own memory — automatically generated from conversations and used to provide context in future sessions.
memoryEmpty: No workspace memories yet. Start a conversation in a workspace and memory will be generated automatically.
memoryDeleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete the memory for this workspace. It will be regenerated from future conversations.
channelsDesc: Connect OpenYak to messaging platforms. Messages will be processed by OpenYak's AI.
gatewayHint: Start the gateway to connect platforms.
tunnelUrlChangedDesc: The tunnel was restarted with a new URL. Mobile devices need to rescan the QR code to reconnect.
qrScanPhone: Scan QR code with your phone
qrScanWhatsapp: Scan QR code in WhatsApp → Linked Devices
platformHelp_whatsapp: Scan QR code with your phone to link WhatsApp
platformHelp_discord: Create a bot at Discord Developer Portal
platformHelp_telegram: Get a token from @BotFather on Telegram
platformHelp_feishu: Create an app at Feishu Open Platform
platformHelp_dingtalk: Create a bot at DingTalk Open Platform
platformHelp_wecom: Create a bot at WeCom Admin Console
platformHelp_qq: Create a bot at QQ Open Platform
platformHelp_websocket: Generic WebSocket channel for custom integrations
customEndpointDesc: Connect to OpenAI-compatible custom endpoints with full control. Add as many as you like.
apiKeyPlaceholderOptional: API Key (Leave blank if not required)
